prompt: Help me build a conversational image editor: the user uploads a product photo, then types follow-up tweaks like 'make the background white' or 'add a soft shadow'. Using @google/genai against the Gemini API, how do I keep the image context across turns, and how many reference images can I send in one request? Show the code.

assertions.text: Uses ai.chats.create(...) + chat.sendMessage(...) to keep image context across turns
Passes the uploaded image as an inlineData part (base64 mimeType+data) or Files API
States reference-image limit: up to 14 total (Flash up to 10 objects + 4 characters)
Uses a correct GA model id (gemini-3.1-flash-image or gemini-3-pro-image), no -preview suffix
